qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: Consider the following program: int main() int f1 () int f2 (int X) int f3 () { { { { f1 (); return(1); f3(); return (5); f2(2); } if (X==1); } f3(); return (0); return f1 (); } else return (X * f2 (X - 1)); }

qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: The least number of temporary variables required to create a three-address code in static single assignment form for the expression is__________________.

qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: Consider the following code segment. x = u - t; y = x * v; x = y + w; y = t - z; y = x * y; The minimum number of total variables required to convert the above code segment to static single assignment form is __________.
